items.headline: Mixed-use housing project approved at 490 East Middlefield Road
items.summary: Mountain View City Council approved a development agreement for a mixed-use residential project on East Middlefield Road. This was the second reading, meaning the project is moving forward after initial council approval.

items.headline: Mountain View applies for state housing incentive funding
items.summary: The city submitted an application to California's Prohousing Incentive Program (Round 4) to secure state funding for housing development. This could bring money to support local housing projects.

items.headline: City seeking public input on $HUD housing grant spending plan
items.summary: Santa Clara is accepting community feedback on how to spend federal HUD housing grants for fiscal year 2026-27. This is your chance to weigh in on priorities for affordable housing and related programs in the city.

items.headline: City hosting community meeting on safe parking program
items.summary: Sunnyvale held a public meeting on Monday, March 23 to discuss a safe parking program, with City Council and the Housing and Human Services Commission present. This appears to be a new or expanded initiative to address vehicle dwelling in the city.

items.headline: Santa Clara Station Area Task Force reviewing major land use changes
items.summary: A task force is reviewing the land use plan and design guidelines for the Station Area (around the Caltrain/VTA transit hub). This could shape future development, density, and character of that neighborhood.
